mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in industrial production signals a strengthening supply chain that boosts corporate profitability and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in strengthening supply periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the unemployment rate signals a tightening labor market that boosts wage growth and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in tightening labor periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in housing starts signals a strengthening demand for residential real estate that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in strengthening demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the federal funds rate and a 2-month increase in the CPI signal a coordinated easing monetary and inflation cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in coordinated easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in industrial production and a 2-month increase in real personal spending signal a strengthening supply chain and demand that boosts corporate profitability and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO rises > 0.5% in 3 months and RSAFS rises > 5% in 2 months
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in strengthening supply and demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the unemployment rate and a 2-month increase in initial claims signal a tightening labor market and weakening demand that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE falls below 5% in 3 months and PAYEMS rises > 10% in 2 months
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in tightening labor and weakening demand periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in housing starts and a 2-month increase in real personal spending signal a strengthening demand for residential real estate and consumer goods that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST rises > 10% in 3 months and RSAFS rises > 5% in 2 months
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in strengthening demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.
